<style>
  :root {
    --network-bg: #030a1c;
    --network-panel: rgba(7, 18, 42, 0.72);
    --network-panel-strong: rgba(9, 22, 50, 0.9);
    --network-line: rgba(176, 203, 244, 0.18);
    --network-line-hot: rgba(255, 201, 117, 0.82);
    --network-text: #f4f8ff;
    --network-muted: #b8cae6;
    --network-soft: #d7e6fb;
    --network-gold: #ffd37d;
    --network-cyan: #81d4ff;
    --network-green: #8de0bd;
    --network-pink: #f0a6c7;
  }

  html,
  body {
    background-color: var(--network-bg);
  }

  body {
    min-height: 100vh;
    color: var(--network-text);
    background-image:
      radial-gradient(circle at 18% 20%, rgba(108, 189, 255, 0.22), transparent 34%),
      radial-gradient(circle at 84% 64%, rgba(255, 149, 82, 0.2), transparent 38%),
      radial-gradient(circle at 52% 108%, rgba(137, 225, 190, 0.12), transparent 42%),
      linear-gradient(145deg, #030a1c 0%, #071329 44%, #101f45 76%, #061126 100%);
    background-attachment: fixed;
    background-repeat: no-repeat;
  }

  .quarto-title-block {
    display: none;
  }

  #quarto-content {
    padding: 0;
  }

  main.content {
    max-width: none;
    padding: 0;
  }

  .network-page {
    width: 100%;
    min-height: calc(100vh - 64px);
    padding: clamp(0.8rem, 1.4vw, 1.35rem);
  }

  .network-hero {
    width: min(1320px, 100%);
    margin: 0 auto 0.75rem auto;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 1.25rem;
  }

  .network-kicker {
    color: var(--network-cyan);
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
  }

  .network-hero h1 {
    color: var(--network-text);
    font-size: clamp(1.7rem, 3.4vw, 3.15rem);
    line-height: 0.95;
    letter-spacing: 0;
    margin: 0;
  }

  .network-hero p {
    max-width: 680px;
    color: var(--network-muted);
    font-size: clamp(0.95rem, 1.4vw, 1.08rem);
    line-height: 1.4;
    margin: 0.45rem 0 0 0;
  }

  .network-actions {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.55rem;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    justify-content: flex-end;
  }

  .network-button {
    border: 1px solid rgba(200, 223, 255, 0.24);
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
    color: var(--network-text);
    border-radius: 999px;
    padding: 0.48rem 0.82rem;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    line-height: 1;
    transition: background-color 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease, color 150ms ease, transform 150ms ease;
  }

  .network-button:hover,
  .network-button:focus-visible {
    border-color: rgba(255, 211, 125, 0.58);
    background: rgba(255, 211, 125, 0.13);
    color: #ffffff;
    transform: translateY(-1px);
  }

  .network-legend {
    width: min(1320px, 100%);
    margin: 0 auto 0.8rem auto;
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 0.45rem;
  }

  .legend-item {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.38rem;
    border: 1px solid rgba(200, 223, 255, 0.18);
    border-radius: 999px;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.045);
    color: var(--network-soft);
    padding: 0.26rem 0.58rem;
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    line-height: 1;
  }

  .legend-swatch {
    width: 0.7rem;
    height: 0.7rem;
    border-radius: 999px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.72);
  }

  .network-shell {
    width: min(1320px, 100%);
    margin: 0 auto 2.2rem auto;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(320px, 380px);
    gap: 1rem;
    align-items: start;
  }

  .network-stage,
  .network-panel {
    border: 1px solid var(--network-line);
    background:
      radial-gradient(circle at 24% 20%, rgba(129, 212, 255, 0.12), transparent 36%),
      linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.055), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.025)),
      var(--network-panel);
    box-shadow: 0 18px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.32);
  }

  .network-stage {
    position: relative;
    height: clamp(540px, calc(100vh - 210px), 680px);
    min-height: 0;
    border-radius: 8px;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .network-stage::after {
    content: "";
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.035) 1px, transparent 1px),
      linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.035) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 44px 44px;
    mask-image: radial-gradient(circle at center, black 0%, black 58%, transparent 96%);
  }

  .network-svg {
    display: block;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    min-height: 0;
  }

  .network-guide {
    fill: none;
    stroke: rgba(200, 223, 255, 0.11);
    stroke-width: 1;
    stroke-dasharray: 4 8;
  }

  .network-spoke {
    stroke: rgba(200, 223, 255, 0.09);
    stroke-width: 1;
    stroke-linecap: round;
    transition: opacity 140ms ease, stroke 140ms ease, stroke-width 140ms ease;
  }

  .network-spoke.is-active {
    stroke: rgba(129, 212, 255, 0.5);
    stroke-width: 1.4;
  }

  .network-edge {
    stroke: rgba(192, 213, 244, 0.13);
    stroke-linecap: round;
    opacity: 0.72;
    transition: stroke 140ms ease, opacity 140ms ease, stroke-width 140ms ease;
  }

  .network-edge.is-active {
    stroke: var(--network-line-hot);
    opacity: 0.92;
  }

  .network-edge.is-muted {
    opacity: 0.08;
  }

  .network-node {
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: opacity 140ms ease, filter 140ms ease;
  }

  .network-node circle {
    stroke: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.76);
    stroke-width: 1.1;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 7px 13px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.38));
  }

  .network-node text {
    fill: #f7fbff;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0;
    paint-order: stroke;
    stroke: rgba(2, 7, 18, 0.86);
    stroke-width: 3px;
    stroke-linejoin: round;
    user-select: none;
  }

  .network-node.is-muted {
    opacity: 0.22;
  }

  .network-node.is-active circle {
    stroke: #ffffff;
    stroke-width: 2.2;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 18px rgba(255, 211, 125, 0.34));
  }

  .network-node.is-active text {
    fill: var(--network-gold);
  }

  .network-node.is-selected circle {
    stroke: var(--network-gold);
    stroke-width: 2;
  }

  .network-node.is-selected text {
    fill: var(--network-gold);
  }

  .network-hub circle {
    fill: rgba(8, 19, 44, 0.92);
    stroke: rgba(255, 211, 125, 0.72);
    stroke-width: 1.5;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 20px rgba(255, 211, 125, 0.2));
  }

  .network-hub .hub-ring {
    fill: none;
    stroke: rgba(129, 212, 255, 0.22);
    stroke-width: 1;
  }

  .network-hub text {
    fill: var(--network-text);
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: 0;
    text-anchor: middle;
    paint-order: stroke;
    stroke: rgba(2, 7, 18, 0.86);
    stroke-width: 3px;
    stroke-linejoin: round;
  }

  .network-hub .hub-subtitle {
    fill: var(--network-muted);
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .network-panel {
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 1rem;
    height: clamp(540px, calc(100vh - 210px), 680px);
    min-height: 0;
    overflow-y: auto;
    overscroll-behavior: contain;
    background:
      radial-gradient(circle at 82% 8%, rgba(255, 211, 125, 0.13), transparent 32%),
      linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.025)),
      var(--network-panel-strong);
    scrollbar-color: rgba(200, 223, 255, 0.35) rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
    scrollbar-width: thin;
  }

  .panel-eyebrow {
    color: var(--network-cyan);
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .panel-name {
    color: var(--network-text);
    font-size: clamp(1.55rem, 3vw, 2.25rem);
    line-height: 1.04;
    margin: 0.35rem 0 0.9rem 0;
  }

  .area-badge {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.38rem;
    color: var(--network-soft);
    border: 1px solid rgba(200, 223, 255, 0.18);
    border-radius: 999px;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.045);
    padding: 0.28rem 0.58rem;
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    line-height: 1;
  }

  .area-badge::before {
    content: "";
    width: 0.68rem;
    height: 0.68rem;
    border-radius: 999px;
    background: var(--area-color, var(--network-cyan));
    border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.72);
  }

  .metric-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
    gap: 0.55rem;
    margin: 1rem 0;
  }

  .metric {
    border: 1px solid rgba(197, 218, 250, 0.16);
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 0.65rem;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.045);
  }

  .metric-value {
    display: block;
    color: var(--network-text);
    font-weight: 800;
    font-size: 1.28rem;
    line-height: 1;
  }

  .metric-label {
    display: block;
    color: var(--network-muted);
    font-size: 0.74rem;
    line-height: 1.25;
    margin-top: 0.32rem;
  }

  .neighbor-list {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 0.4rem;
    margin: 0.7rem 0 1rem 0;
  }

  .neighbor-pill {
    border: 1px solid rgba(200, 223, 255, 0.18);
    border-radius: 999px;
    padding: 0.22rem 0.52rem;
    color: var(--network-soft);
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.045);
    font-size: 0.78rem;
  }

  .panel-section-title {
    color: var(--network-soft);
    font-weight: 800;
    font-size: 0.86rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin: 1.05rem 0 0.55rem 0;
  }

  .paper-list {
    display: grid;
    gap: 0.6rem;
    margin-top: 0.55rem;
  }

  .paper-link {
    display: block;
    color: var(--network-text);
    text-decoration: none;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(200, 223, 255, 0.15);
    padding-top: 0.62rem;
  }

  .paper-link:hover,
  .paper-link:focus-visible {
    color: var(--network-gold);
  }

  .paper-title {
    display: block;
    font-size: 0.91rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    line-height: 1.25;
  }

  .paper-meta {
    display: block;
    color: var(--network-muted);
    font-size: 0.76rem;
    line-height: 1.35;
    margin-top: 0.28rem;
  }

  .network-meta {
    width: min(1320px, 100%);
    margin: 0 auto;
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 0.55rem;
    color: var(--network-muted);
  }

  .meta-chip {
    border: 1px solid rgba(200, 223, 255, 0.16);
    border-radius: 999px;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.045);
    padding: 0.32rem 0.68rem;
    font-size: 0.78rem;
  }

  @media (max-width: 1060px) {
    .network-hero {
      display: block;
    }

    .network-actions {
      justify-content: flex-start;
      margin-top: 1rem;
    }

    .network-shell {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }

    .network-stage,
    .network-panel {
      height: auto;
      min-height: auto;
    }

    .network-stage,
    .network-svg {
      min-height: 520px;
    }

    .network-panel {
      max-height: none;
      overflow-y: visible;
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 640px) {
    .network-page {
      padding: 0.85rem;
    }

    .network-stage {
      height: 500px;
    }

    .network-svg {
      min-height: 0;
    }

    .metric-grid {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }
  }
</style>

<div class="network-page">
  <section class="network-hero" aria-labelledby="network-title">
    <div>
      <h1 id="network-title">Collaboration Network</h1>
      <p>Top shared coauthors arranged by article count and collaboration overlap. Circle size reflects shared articles; color marks broad collaboration area.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="network-actions">
      <button class="network-button" id="motionToggle" type="button">Pause Motion</button>
      <button class="network-button" id="resetNetwork" type="button">Reset</button>
    </div>
  </section>

  <div class="network-legend" id="networkLegend" aria-label="Collaboration area color legend"></div>

  <section class="network-shell">
    <div class="network-stage">
      <svg class="network-svg" id="networkSvg" viewBox="0 0 1080 720" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMin meet" role="img" aria-labelledby="network-title"></svg>
    </div>
    <aside class="network-panel" id="networkPanel" aria-live="polite"></aside>
  </section>

  <div class="network-meta" id="networkMeta"></div>
</div>

<script>
(() => {
  const payload = JSON.parse(document.getElementById("collabPayload").textContent);
  const svg = document.getElementById("networkSvg");
  const panel = document.getElementById("networkPanel");
  const meta = document.getElementById("networkMeta");
  const legend = document.getElementById("networkLegend");
  const motionToggle = document.getElementById("motionToggle");
  const resetNetwork = document.getElementById("resetNetwork");
  const width = 1080;
  const height = 720;
  const center = { x: width / 2, y: height / 2 };
  const nodes = payload.nodes.map((node, index) => ({ ...node, index, phase: index * 0.77, x: 0, y: 0, vx: 0, vy: 0 }));
  const links = payload.links.map(link => ({ ...link }));
  const nodeById = new Map(nodes.map(node => [node.id, node]));
  const neighbors = new Map(nodes.map(node => [node.id, new Set()]));
  const linkByPair = new Map();
  const palette = ["#81d4ff", "#ffd37d", "#8de0bd", "#f0a6c7", "#aeb7ff", "#ffb18b"];

  links.forEach(link => {
    neighbors.get(link.source)?.add(link.target);
    neighbors.get(link.target)?.add(link.source);
    linkByPair.set([link.source, link.target].sort().join("|"), link);
  });

  const maxScore = Math.max(...nodes.map(node => node.radius_score || 1));
  const minScore = Math.min(...nodes.map(node => node.radius_score || 1));
  const scoreSpan = Math.max(1, maxScore - minScore);
  const maxPapers = Math.max(...nodes.map(node => node.papers || 1));
  const minPapers = Math.min(...nodes.map(node => node.papers || 1));
  const paperSpan = Math.max(1, maxPapers - minPapers);
  const maxWeight = Math.max(...links.map(link => link.weight || 1));

  let selectedId = nodes[0]?.id;
  let hoverId = null;
  let motionEnabled = true;
  let motionClock = 0;
  let lastFrame = performance.now();
  let dragging = null;
  const areaStyles = {
    "Global Health & Infectious Disease": { color: "#76d2ff", order: 1 },
    "VA & Health Services": { color: "#8de0bd", order: 2 },
    "Ophthalmology": { color: "#aeb7ff", order: 3 },
    "Reproductive Health": { color: "#ffae8a", order: 4 },
    "Public Health & Surveillance": { color: "#ffd37d", order: 5 },
    "Other Collaborations": { color: "#c9d3e6", order: 6 }
  };

  function paperScale(node) {
    return ((node.papers || minPapers) - minPapers) / paperSpan;
  }

  function scaleRadius(node) {
    return 12 + Math.pow(paperScale(node), 0.72) * 38;
  }

  function scaleFont(node) {
    return 9.5 + Math.pow(paperScale(node), 0.72) * 6.4;
  }

  function colorFor(node) {
    return areaStyles[node.area]?.color || palette[node.index % palette.length];
  }

  function areaColor(area) {
    return areaStyles[area]?.color || "#c9d3e6";
  }

  function escapeHtml(value) {
    return String(value ?? "").replace(/[&<>"']/g, char => ({
      "&": "&",
      "<": "<",
      ">": ">",
      '"': """,
      "'": "'"
    }[char]));
  }

  function initializeLayout() {
    const sorted = [...nodes].sort((a, b) => (b.radius_score || 0) - (a.radius_score || 0));
    const rings = [
      { nodes: sorted.slice(0, 8), rx: 260, ry: 170, offset: -Math.PI / 2 },
      { nodes: sorted.slice(8), rx: 430, ry: 285, offset: -Math.PI / 2 + Math.PI / 12 }
    ];

    rings.forEach(ring => {
      ring.nodes.forEach((node, index) => {
        const theta = ring.offset + (index / ring.nodes.length) * Math.PI * 2;
        node.x = center.x + Math.cos(theta) * ring.rx;
        node.y = center.y + Math.sin(theta) * ring.ry;
      });
    });

    sorted.forEach(node => {
      node.vx = 0;
      node.vy = 0;
    });
  }

  function motionOffset(node) {
    if (!motionEnabled || dragging === node.id) return { x: 0, y: 0 };
    const isHover = hoverId === node.id;
    const amplitude = isHover ? 8 : 2.6;
    return {
      x: Math.cos(motionClock * 0.0012 + node.phase) * amplitude * 0.46,
      y: Math.sin(motionClock * 0.00145 + node.phase) * amplitude
    };
  }

  function projectPoint(node) {
    const offset = motionOffset(node);
    return { x: node.x + offset.x, y: node.y + offset.y };
  }

  function activeNodeId() {
    return hoverId || dragging;
  }

  function isConnectedToActive(id) {
    const active = activeNodeId();
    return id === active || neighbors.get(active)?.has(id);
  }

  function isActiveLink(link) {
    const active = activeNodeId();
    return link.source === active || link.target === active;
  }

  function render() {
    const active = activeNodeId();
    const hasActive = Boolean(active);
    const defaultLinkThreshold = 4;
    svg.innerHTML = "";

    const guideGroup = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "g");
    const spokeGroup = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "g");
    const edgeGroup = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "g");
    const hubGroup = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "g");
    const nodeGroup = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "g");

    [
      { rx: 260, ry: 170 },
      { rx: 430, ry: 285 }
    ].forEach(ring => {
      const ellipse = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "ellipse");
      ellipse.setAttribute("cx", center.x);
      ellipse.setAttribute("cy", center.y);
      ellipse.setAttribute("rx", ring.rx);
      ellipse.setAttribute("ry", ring.ry);
      ellipse.classList.add("network-guide");
      guideGroup.appendChild(ellipse);
    });

    nodes.forEach(node => {
      const point = projectPoint(node);
      const line = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "line");
      line.setAttribute("x1", center.x);
      line.setAttribute("y1", center.y);
      line.setAttribute("x2", point.x);
      line.setAttribute("y2", point.y);
      line.classList.add("network-spoke");
      if (node.id === active || node.id === selectedId) line.classList.add("is-active");
      spokeGroup.appendChild(line);
    });

    links.forEach(link => {
      const activeLink = hasActive && isActiveLink(link);
      if (!activeLink && link.weight < defaultLinkThreshold) return;
      const source = nodeById.get(link.source);
      const target = nodeById.get(link.target);
      if (!source || !target) return;
      const a = projectPoint(source);
      const b = projectPoint(target);
      const line = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "line");
      line.setAttribute("x1", a.x);
      line.setAttribute("y1", a.y);
      line.setAttribute("x2", b.x);
      line.setAttribute("y2", b.y);
      line.setAttribute("stroke-width", 0.65 + (link.weight / maxWeight) * 3.2);
      line.classList.add("network-edge");
      if (activeLink) line.classList.add("is-active");
      if (hasActive && !activeLink) line.classList.add("is-muted");
      edgeGroup.appendChild(line);
    });

    const hubRing = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "circle");
    const hubCircle = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "circle");
    const hubName = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "text");
    const hubSubtitle = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "text");
    hubGroup.classList.add("network-hub");
    hubRing.classList.add("hub-ring");
    hubRing.setAttribute("cx", center.x);
    hubRing.setAttribute("cy", center.y);
    hubRing.setAttribute("r", 76);
    hubCircle.setAttribute("cx", center.x);
    hubCircle.setAttribute("cy", center.y);
    hubCircle.setAttribute("r", 54);
    hubName.setAttribute("x", center.x);
    hubName.setAttribute("y", center.y - 3);
    hubName.setAttribute("font-size", "19");
    hubName.textContent = "Ben Brintz";
    hubSubtitle.classList.add("hub-subtitle");
    hubSubtitle.setAttribute("x", center.x);
    hubSubtitle.setAttribute("y", center.y + 18);
    hubSubtitle.textContent = "shared coauthors";
    hubGroup.appendChild(hubRing);
    hubGroup.appendChild(hubCircle);
    hubGroup.appendChild(hubName);
    hubGroup.appendChild(hubSubtitle);

    [...nodes].sort((a, b) => scaleRadius(a) - scaleRadius(b)).forEach(node => {
      const point = projectPoint(node);
      const group = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "g");
      const circle = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "circle");
      const text = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "text");
      const radius = scaleRadius(node);
      const theta = Math.atan2(point.y - center.y, point.x - center.x);
      const labelDistance = radius + 14;
      let labelX = point.x + Math.cos(theta) * labelDistance;
      let labelY = point.y + Math.sin(theta) * labelDistance + 4;
      let labelAnchor = "middle";

      group.classList.add("network-node");
      group.setAttribute("tabindex", "0");
      group.setAttribute("role", "button");
      group.setAttribute("aria-label", node.name);
      group.dataset.id = node.id;
      if (node.id === selectedId) group.classList.add("is-selected");
      if (hasActive && isConnectedToActive(node.id)) group.classList.add("is-active");
      if (hasActive && !isConnectedToActive(node.id)) group.classList.add("is-muted");

      if (Math.cos(theta) > 0.24) labelAnchor = "start";
      if (Math.cos(theta) < -0.24) labelAnchor = "end";
      if (labelX < 70) {
        labelX = 70;
        labelAnchor = "start";
      }
      if (labelX > width - 70) {
        labelX = width - 70;
        labelAnchor = "end";
      }
      labelY = Math.max(52, Math.min(height - 42, labelY));

      circle.setAttribute("cx", point.x);
      circle.setAttribute("cy", point.y);
      circle.setAttribute("r", radius);
      circle.setAttribute("fill", colorFor(node));

      text.setAttribute("x", labelX);
      text.setAttribute("y", labelY);
      text.setAttribute("text-anchor", labelAnchor);
      text.setAttribute("font-size", scaleFont(node).toFixed(1));
      text.textContent = node.name;

      group.appendChild(circle);
      group.appendChild(text);
      nodeGroup.appendChild(group);
    });

    svg.appendChild(guideGroup);
    svg.appendChild(spokeGroup);
    svg.appendChild(edgeGroup);
    svg.appendChild(hubGroup);
    svg.appendChild(nodeGroup);
  }

  function paperMarkup(publications = []) {
    return publications.slice(0, 5).map(paper => {
      const year = paper.year || "n.d.";
      const cites = Number.isFinite(paper.cites) ? `${paper.cites} cites` : "citations unavailable";
      const journal = paper.journal ? `${escapeHtml(paper.journal)} · ` : "";
      const url = paper.url || "#";
      return `
        <a class="paper-link" href="${escapeHtml(url)}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
          <span class="paper-title">${escapeHtml(paper.title)}</span>
          <span class="paper-meta">${journal}${year} · ${cites}</span>
        </a>
      `;
    }).join("");
  }

  function updatePanel() {
    const node = nodeById.get(selectedId) || nodes[0];
    if (!node) return;
    const neighborRows = [...(neighbors.get(node.id) || [])]
      .map(id => {
        const other = nodeById.get(id);
        const link = linkByPair.get([node.id, id].sort().join("|"));
        return { other, weight: link?.weight || 0 };
      })
      .filter(row => row.other)
      .sort((a, b) => b.weight - a.weight || a.other.name.localeCompare(b.other.name))
      .slice(0, 10);

    const yearSpan = node.first_year && node.last_year
      ? (node.first_year === node.last_year ? node.first_year : `${node.first_year}-${node.last_year}`)
      : "n.d.";

    panel.innerHTML = `
      <div class="panel-eyebrow">Selected Collaborator</div>
      <h2 class="panel-name">${escapeHtml(node.name)}</h2>
      <div class="area-badge" style="--area-color: ${areaColor(node.area)}">${escapeHtml(node.area || "Other Collaborations")}</div>
      <div class="metric-grid">
        <div class="metric">
          <span class="metric-value">${node.papers}</span>
          <span class="metric-label">Shared articles</span>
        </div>
        <div class="metric">
          <span class="metric-value">${node.weighted_degree}</span>
          <span class="metric-label">Connection weight</span>
        </div>
        <div class="metric">
          <span class="metric-value">${node.degree}</span>
          <span class="metric-label">Top-coauthor links</span>
        </div>
        <div class="metric">
          <span class="metric-value">${yearSpan}</span>
          <span class="metric-label">Publication span</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="panel-section-title">Nearest Coauthors</div>
      <div class="neighbor-list">
        ${neighborRows.map(row => `<span class="neighbor-pill">${escapeHtml(row.other.name)} · ${row.weight}</span>`).join("") || '<span class="neighbor-pill">No top-network links</span>'}
      </div>
      <div class="panel-section-title">Representative Papers</div>
      <div class="paper-list">${paperMarkup(node.publications)}</div>
    `;
  }

  function updateMeta() {
    const generated = payload.generated_at ? payload.generated_at.replace(/:[0-9]{2} /, " ") : "recently";
    meta.innerHTML = `
      <span class="meta-chip">${nodes.length} collaborators</span>
      <span class="meta-chip">${links.length} coauthor links</span>
      <span class="meta-chip">${payload.publication_count} article records</span>
      <span class="meta-chip">Built ${generated}</span>
    `;
  }

  function updateLegend() {
    const areas = [...new Set(nodes.map(node => node.area || "Other Collaborations"))]
      .sort((a, b) => (areaStyles[a]?.order || 99) - (areaStyles[b]?.order || 99) || a.localeCompare(b));

    legend.innerHTML = areas.map(area => `
      <span class="legend-item">
        <span class="legend-swatch" style="background: ${areaColor(area)}"></span>
        ${escapeHtml(area)}
      </span>
    `).join("");
  }

  function svgPointFromEvent(event) {
    const point = svg.createSVGPoint();
    point.x = event.clientX;
    point.y = event.clientY;
    return point.matrixTransform(svg.getScreenCTM().inverse());
  }

  svg.addEventListener("pointerdown", event => {
    const group = event.target.closest(".network-node");
    if (!group) return;
    selectedId = group.dataset.id;
    hoverId = selectedId;
    dragging = group.dataset.id;
    svg.setPointerCapture(event.pointerId);
    updatePanel();
    render();
  });

  svg.addEventListener("pointermove", event => {
    const group = event.target.closest(".network-node");
    hoverId = group?.dataset.id || (dragging ? dragging : null);

    if (dragging) {
      const node = nodeById.get(dragging);
      const raw = svgPointFromEvent(event);
      node.x = Math.max(70, Math.min(width - 70, raw.x));
      node.y = Math.max(70, Math.min(height - 82, raw.y));
    }

    render();
  });

  svg.addEventListener("pointerup", event => {
    dragging = null;
    hoverId = null;
    if (svg.hasPointerCapture(event.pointerId)) svg.releasePointerCapture(event.pointerId);
    render();
  });

  svg.addEventListener("pointerleave", () => {
    if (!dragging) {
      hoverId = null;
      render();
    }
  });

  svg.addEventListener("click", event => {
    const group = event.target.closest(".network-node");
    if (!group) return;
    selectedId = group.dataset.id;
    hoverId = null;
    updatePanel();
    render();
  });

  svg.addEventListener("keydown", event => {
    const group = event.target.closest(".network-node");
    if (!group || !["Enter", " "].includes(event.key)) return;
    event.preventDefault();
    selectedId = group.dataset.id;
    hoverId = null;
    updatePanel();
    render();
  });

  motionToggle.addEventListener("click", () => {
    motionEnabled = !motionEnabled;
    motionToggle.textContent = motionEnabled ? "Pause Motion" : "Start Motion";
    render();
  });

  resetNetwork.addEventListener("click", () => {
    selectedId = nodes[0]?.id;
    hoverId = null;
    dragging = null;
    motionEnabled = true;
    motionClock = 0;
    motionToggle.textContent = "Pause Motion";
    initializeLayout();
    updatePanel();
    render();
  });

  function animate(now) {
    const elapsed = now - lastFrame;
    lastFrame = now;
    if (motionEnabled && !dragging) {
      motionClock += elapsed;
      render();
    }
    requestAnimationFrame(animate);
  }

  initializeLayout();
  updatePanel();
  updateLegend();
  updateMeta();
  render();
  requestAnimationFrame(animate);
})();
</script>
